title: Apply to become a registered charity - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply to become a registered charity
Applying to become a registered charity is a 4-step process. Within the four steps below, you will find tools to help you decide whether you should apply, and what documents to send in with your application.

## Services and information
- Make an informed decision about becoming a registered charity Determine whether you should apply to become a registered charity.

### Make an informed decision about becoming a registered charity
Determine whether you should apply to become a registered charity.
- Set up your organization before applying for registration Things you need to know before establishing yourself as a legal entity.

### Set up your organization before applying for registration
Things you need to know before establishing yourself as a legal entity.
- Apply for registration Applying for charitable registration, information and documentation you will need to provide, and tips about the application.

### Apply for registration
Applying for charitable registration, information and documentation you will need to provide, and tips about the application.
- Application review process Our review process after you have submitted your application

### Application review process
Our review process after you have submitted your application
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
